# Evidence Package Index

This release contains the canonical source, cumulative Ordo rail, registries, schemas, templates, backlog, validation report, checksum manifest and handoff materials.

## Authority order

1. `000_PLAYBOOK_CONTRACT.md`
2. `source/program.ordo.yaml`
3. numbered canonical documents
4. machine-readable registries and policies
5. schemas and templates
6. `BACKLOG.md`
7. reports and compiled views

## Current boundary

Epic 01–12 are complete. `BL-BENCH-041` remains open; therefore an enforceable scoped YAML patch verifier is not claimed.
